title: rhodococcum vitis-idaea
intro: Rhodococcum vitis-idaea, also known as Iceland moss, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Roccellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Iceland moss include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and respiratory issues. Iceland moss can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
